brief_notes: Compact baseline with 2 tables summarizing key domain and transmission statistics. All key numbers match extraction: transmission frequencies, domain extent, density, counts, fraction covered, synapses per domain, p<10^-9, recording duration 29±8 / 26±6 min, inter-synapse distance 4±1 μm, 5-15 Hz imaging, 0.32 μm pixel, 1.5-2 μm planes. Sections Intro/Methods/Results/Discussion are clean and organized. No figures. Methods section covers in utero electroporation, imaging details, voltage pulses (30V, 50ms, 950ms).
